title: Egg White Omelet with Turkey & Spinach Recipe (280 Cal, 38g Protein) | Eati
introduction: Egg White Omelet with Turkey & Spinach is a high-protein meal delivering 38g of protein and 280 calories per serving — designed for muscle building and fat loss. With 8g of fat and 6g of carbohydrates, it fits comfortably into any macro-tracked eating plan. Log it in Eati to track your macros automatically and stay on target.

sections.heading: Ingredients
sections.content:
- 6 egg whites (or 180g liquid egg whites)
- 80g turkey breast slices, diced
- 60g baby spinach
- 1 tsp olive oil or cooking spray
- Salt, pepper, garlic powder
- Optional: 20g low-fat cheese

sections.heading: Instructions
sections.content:
1. Whisk egg whites with salt, pepper, and garlic powder.
2. Heat a non-stick pan over medium heat. Spray with cooking spray or add olive oil.
3. Add turkey, cook 1 minute.
4. Add spinach, stir until wilted (1–2 minutes).
5. Pour egg whites over the filling. Cook without stirring until edges set, then fold.
6. Cover and cook 1–2 more minutes until fully set.
7. Log in Eati: 'egg whites 180g, turkey breast 80g, spinach 60g'.

sections.heading: Calories, Protein, Fat & Carbs
sections.content:
Per serving (estimated):

Calories: 280 kcal
Protein: 38g
Fat: 8g
Carbohydrates: 6g

Macro split: 54% protein / 26% fat / 9% carbs

Protein per 100 calories: 13.6g

Note: values are estimates based on typical ingredient weights. Log exact portions in Eati for precise tracking — the app calculates macros automatically from your description or a barcode scan.

sections.heading: Why Egg White Omelet with Turkey & Spinach Works for Muscle Gain and Weight Loss
sections.content:
With only 280 calories and 38g of protein, this omelet has the best protein-to-calorie ratio of any dish on this list — matching a 5-egg omelet's protein content at half the calories.

Macro breakdown (estimated):
• 280 calories
• 38g protein
• 8g fat
• 6g carbohydrates

Egg whites are nearly pure protein:
One egg white provides ~3.6g protein and just 17 calories with virtually zero fat. Six egg whites deliver 22g protein for 102 calories — one of the most efficient protein sources available. Adding turkey breast brings total protein to 38g while keeping total calories under 300.

sections.heading: Variations and Serving Ideas
sections.content:
1. Cheese added (330 cal, 42g protein): add 30g reduced-fat cheddar.
2. Full egg version (380 cal, 35g protein): use 2 whole eggs + 4 egg whites.
3. Veggie packed (295 cal, 38g protein): add mushrooms, bell pepper, tomato.

sections.heading: Meal Prep, Storage & Time-Saving Tips
sections.content: Best eaten fresh (1 minute to make). Pre-mix egg whites and seasonings in a jar (3 days refrigerated). Pre-dice turkey and portion spinach for 3-day prep.

midArticleCta: Track the exact macros for Egg White Omelet with Turkey & Spinach in Eati — type what you ate or snap a photo and let the app calculate protein, calories, fat, and carbs instantly.
conclusion: Egg White Omelet with Turkey & Spinach delivers 38g of protein in 280 calories — a macro profile that makes it one of the most effective dishes for body recomposition. Add it to your weekly rotation, track each serving in Eati, and let consistent protein intake do the work.

faqs.question: How many calories in an egg white omelet with turkey?
faqs.answer: About 280 calories with 6 egg whites and 80g turkey — 38g protein, 8g fat, 6g carbs. One of the highest-protein, lowest-calorie meals available.

faqs.question: How many egg whites for a high-protein omelet?
faqs.answer: 5–7 egg whites (150–210ml liquid egg whites) provide 20–25g of protein. Adding 80g of turkey or 100g of cottage cheese brings total protein to 35–45g per serving.
